description: Style NoteAdd a touch of style to your Sports-wear wardrobe with this T-shirt from nike that features an abstract geometric print on its front. Its Dri-Fit quality pulls away sweat to help keep you dry and comfortable. Pair it with track pants and sneakers for a jog in the park. Product DetailsMoss green boat neck T-shirt with abstract silver geometric print on front, short raglan sleeves, flat lock detail at all seams, printed brand logo at back neck to provide abrasion free comfortWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)Materials and Care100% polyesterMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not iron on printSize and FitRegular fitThe model(height5'8 and chest 33) is wearing a size M
